prompt:
A structured sensory evaluation scorecard on a tasting table, showing onset timing, sweetness intensity, bitterness, and confidence through columns, rating bars, and plotted marks rather than readable text. Small tasting cups and a pencil nearby make it obvious this is a panel-scoring instrument for controlled sensory work. The sheet should feel systematic and data-oriented rather than like casual tasting notes.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future food-testing aesthetic: soft indoor lighting, realistic paper, cup, and pencil textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the scorecard centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a formal sensory panel artifact.
